_comment: Fresh 5-star Google review excerpts shown on the homepage. OVERWRITTEN WEEKLY by the n8n 'Grooming Reviews Rotator' workflow (see HANDOVER) — do not hand-edit except to fix an emergency. Excerpts are verbatim contiguous fragments of real reviews (ellipsis = truncated), author-attributed, from the salon's own Google Business Profile. Seeded from the 2026-07-12 harvest of the old site's live reviews widget.

reviews.author: Mollie Taylor
reviews.text: The lovely people at the fairy tails grooming are so amazing and caring towards all the animals. My crazy caramel has been going there for her groom around 2 years now and she loves them all…

reviews.author: Deborah-Marie Aldred
reviews.text: Great experience for my pup! He looks and smells gorgeous. Thank you Fairy Tails.

reviews.author: Samantha Lake
reviews.text: Simply wonderful! The first proper 'professional bath/groom' for our 2 x year old Cane Corso, who is 'slightly sceptical around water!' Of course, the amazing Fairy Tails team put her straight at ease…

reviews.author: Tonita Shale
reviews.text: Today was Obie's very first trip to the groomers. Both he and I were very nervous! I am thrilled with how well Obie has been groomed and taken care of this afternoon…
